findings.detail: This capability may be asked for targets such as top, ranked, selected, recommended, or at-risk records. The package should state whether the service chooses that group, or the consuming app chooses it before calling.
findings.recommendation: Choose one reviewed path: make the service own the full selection-and-action flow, mark target selection as app-owned glue, or accept that vague target requests must ask for clarification.
findings.title: Who chooses the target group?

findings.title: Optional input needs an omission rule

probes.label: Missing context probe
probes.prompt: Invoke gtm.pipeline_summary without quarter.
probes.rationale: Required business context should produce a predictable clarification outcome.

probes.label: Unsupported effect probe
probes.prompt: Ask gtm.pipeline_summary to perform an explicitly unsupported effect.
probes.rationale: Declared business effects should make package boundaries testable before paid LLM benchmark runs.

probes.label: Missing context probe
probes.prompt: Invoke gtm.pipeline_forecast_summary without quarter.
probes.rationale: Required business context should produce a predictable clarification outcome.

probes.label: Derived target probe
probes.prompt: Ask gtm.pipeline_forecast_summary for a top, selected, or derived target without explicitly naming the target entity.
probes.rationale: Derived target requests should not silently treat vague business language as literal entity identifiers.

probes.label: Unsupported effect probe
probes.prompt: Ask gtm.pipeline_forecast_summary to perform an explicitly unsupported effect.
probes.rationale: Declared business effects should make package boundaries testable before paid LLM benchmark runs.

probes.rationale: Required business context should produce a predictable clarification outcome.

probes.rationale: Derived target requests should not silently treat vague business language as literal entity identifiers.

probes.label: Unsupported effect probe
probes.prompt: Ask gtm.stage_bottleneck_summary to perform an explicitly unsupported effect.
probes.rationale: Declared business effects should make package boundaries testable before paid LLM benchmark runs.

probes.rationale: Required business context should produce a predictable clarification outcome.

probes.label: Derived target probe

probes.rationale: Derived target requests should not silently treat vague business language as literal entity identifiers.

probes.label: Unsupported effect probe

probes.label: Missing context probe
probes.prompt: Invoke gtm.prepare_followup_tasks without quarter.
probes.rationale: Required business context should produce a predictable clarification outcome.

probes.label: Approval-preview boundary probe
probes.prompt: Ask for a read summary and also ask gtm.prepare_followup_tasks to prepare, preview, plan, or route the governed action.
probes.rationale: Compound requests that include approval-preview behavior must select the governed boundary capability instead of a harmless read-only capability.

probes.label: Unsupported effect probe
probes.prompt: Ask gtm.prepare_followup_tasks to perform an explicitly unsupported effect.
probes.rationale: Declared business effects should make package boundaries testable before paid LLM benchmark runs.

probes.label: Missing context probe
probes.prompt: Invoke gtm.prepare_reassignment_plan without quarter.
probes.rationale: Required business context should produce a predictable clarification outcome.

probes.label: Approval-preview boundary probe
probes.prompt: Ask for a read summary and also ask gtm.prepare_reassignment_plan to prepare, preview, plan, or route the governed action.
probes.rationale: Compound requests that include approval-preview behavior must select the governed boundary capability instead of a harmless read-only capability.

probes.label: Unsupported effect probe
probes.prompt: Ask gtm.prepare_reassignment_plan to perform an explicitly unsupported effect.
probes.rationale: Declared business effects should make package boundaries testable before paid LLM benchmark runs.

probes.label: Missing context probe
probes.prompt: Invoke gtm.account_enrichment_summary without account_names.
probes.rationale: Required business context should produce a predictable clarification outcome.

probes.label: Ungrounded reference probe
probes.prompt: Ask gtm.account_enrichment_summary for top or priority results without naming a concrete value for account_names.
probes.rationale: Agents must not synthesize required reference, cohort, owner, or target scope from examples or implied defaults.
